data.body:
=== gc-corruption fix (LANDED) + tickets-repo growth brainstorm (HANDOFF) ===

PART 1 — CI failure debug + fix (COMPLETE, landed on main):
- Root cause (proven, git 2.54): git>=2.47 `git commit` spawns a DETACHED `git maintenance run
  --auto` (repack --cruft --write-midx) that runs OUTSIDE rebar's write lock, racing concurrent
  writers on the shared linked-worktree object DB -> corruption (invalid object / Error building
  trees) -> dropped writes. rebar's lock is sound (0 overlaps). gc.auto=0 does NOT fix it
  (git>=2.47 gates on maintenance.auto, not gc.auto). Prior session's conclusion (py3.11-only;
  heal in delete_events) was WRONG.
- Fix: _gc_config_unit forces auto-gc FOREGROUND (gc.autoDetach=false + maintenance.autoDetach
  =false; gc.auto unset). Landed Gerrit 774 (MERGED). Temp skip 768 (merged->superseded).
  ADR 0051. Bug 88eb CLOSED+certified. Idea 341a (future posture: disable gc task, use
  loose-objects + geometric incremental-repack to bound per-run cost).

PART 2 — Tickets-repo unbounded-growth (measured facts, brainstorm ONGOING):
- Repo = 443 MB / ~178k objects for ~15k tickets. PACKED SIZE: blobs 424MB (95.7%),
  trees 10.7MB (2.4%), commits 8.2MB (1.8%). => tree churn / directory structure / sharding /
  active-archive split are the WRONG lever for SIZE (git deltas trees to ~0; sharding measured
  to INCREASE object count 2.00->3.00 trees/commit).
- Blob breakdown: .bridge_state = 375 MB (~85%): bindings.json 219MB/987 versions +
  prev_snapshot.json 155MB/4450 versions (full Jira snapshot up to 3.37MB/version, poor delta).
  Actual ticket/event blobs ~35 MB, slow growth.
- .bridge_state = reconciler Jira-sync cache. OPERATOR CORRECTION: it is CRITICAL, REQUIRED
  Jira infrastructure — do NOT propose removing it. My "stop versioning it" framing was
  rejected. New session must FIRST understand reconciler requirements (ADR 0026 three-way-merge
  -baseline, ADR 0027 binding lifecycle, WU-3 .gitattributes merge=ours) before any proposal.
- verify-identity whole-store scan cost: OWNED BY ANOTHER SESSION now; out of scope.

CONSTRAINTS: readers list the WORKTREE not history; cross-clone sync = union-merge of tickets
branch (any history checkpoint must be deterministic + re-applied on merge — git-annex forget
model); single-writer write lock; every write auto-commits+auto-pushes to origin/tickets.
Watch: events may bind trust to commit identity (signatures/attestations) — a squash/re-root
rewrites commit SHAs and could break those; must verify before any history rewrite.
